scripts.build: pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/shared build && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/api build && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/web typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/shared test && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/shared build && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/api test && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/web test
